# GFM Test Data

This directory contains the pinned GFM specification test corpus.

- `gfm-0.29.json` — extracted from [github/cmark-gfm](https://github.com/github/cmark-gfm)
  `test/spec.txt` (GFM spec version 0.29, 2019-04-06).

The JSON was generated by parsing the spec.txt example blocks.
Each example has: markdown, html, example number, section, and
extension tag (table, strikethrough, autolink, tagfilter, disabled, or empty).
